reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
이런 귀여운 편지지 보셨나여..🥹
진짜 세상 기욤뽀짝 🤍
편지쓰는 사람도 기분이 좋아지는 매직 ⭐️
강아지 뿐만 아니라 사람도 생각해주는 바잇미 ☀️
reviews.content_en:
Have you ever seen stationery this cute..🥹
Honestly, it's so fluffy and adorable 🤍
There's something magical about it that puts you in a good mood while writing ⭐️
BITE ME thinks about people too, not just dogs ☀️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable! I bought it to write birthday cards!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: I love it, really happy with it 👍
